opinion.h4: McCAULEY v. CONSOLIDATED UNDERWRITERS. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF CIVIL APPEALS OF TEXAS, NINTH SUPREME JUDICIAL DISTRICT. No. 162, Misc. Decided October 12, 1959.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
361 U.S. 14 JORDAN v. MICHIGAN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MICHIGAN. No. 201, Misc. Decided October 12, 1959.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
